nasb.text: Now John himself had a garment of camel’s hair and a leather belt around his waist; and his food was locusts and wild honey.

esv.text: Now John wore a garment of camel’s hair and a leather belt around his waist, and his food was locusts and wild honey.

cnv.text: 約翰身穿駱駝毛的衣服，腰束皮帶，吃的是蝗蟲和野蜜。

ccb.text: 约翰身穿骆驼毛的衣服，腰束皮带，吃的是蝗虫、野蜜。

csbs.text: 约翰穿着骆驼毛做的衣服，腰束皮带。他的食物是蝗虫和野蜜。
